case_title: SAURABH SUREKA ET AL VS. ZEUS LIVING, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50 REMARKS: PER CURRENT BUSINESS THE DEFENDANT BUSINESS IS NO LONGER LOCATED AT CURRENT ADDRESS, THEY MOVED 3 MONTHS AGO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUREKA, SAURABH SINGH, ALPIKA AS TO DEFENDANT ZEUS LIVING, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY SUREKA, SAURABH SINGH, ALPIKA AS TO DEFENDANT ZEUS LIVING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SAURABH SUREKA & ALPIKA SINGH. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT ZEUS LIVING, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
